name: Play From Hand - Against Opponent Ally
description: Proof-of-concept editable scenario that starts from a known fixture, swaps a hand card for player one, and appends a targetable ally to the opponent's field.

champion.description: Card ID to use as player one's champion on the field (replaces myField-0). Omit to keep the default fixture champion.

handCard.description: Card ID to place into player one's hand at myHand-2 before the draft test starts.

opponentFieldCard.description: Card ID to append to the opponent's field as a valid target for the test card.
